Well just had happen. The Peach Tree just decided was time flower and along comes April snow shower. Looks iffy for peaches again this year. However, given the lack moisture have had this spring five inches April shower truly welcomed event and perhaps will bring May flowers.
The melting snow will keep the temps from going below freezing. They might survive and give you peaches.
Jim, will see was well below freezing last night. This happens most years and peaches seem come only about once every 3-4 years. have tried cover the tree from time time but got lazy this year.
Crossing fingers for the peaches!
Thanks, going take little luck and sunshine. Hope your day going well.
Very pretty like Japanese print, but little sad, too.
Eliza, yes there yin-yangness the late season snow this year. Probably another year without peaches yet sure did need the moisture and all the plants will very happy.
captures natures moment harsh reality beautifully Mike.
Thanks Val. Hop your spring treating you well.

Some days wonder wedding banquets Singapore, especially the traditional Chinese sit-down dinner for the married couple for the married couple's parents. You know what mean, room tables, tables are for the bride's extended family, tables are for the groom's extended family. The remaining tables are either for friends the bride and groom put relatives that one really wants acknowledge. Like that weird uncle who's starting look more and more like his possessed Chihuahua.
matter what your guest arrangement, you'll need find hotel that provides wedding package that fits your needs, including your budget. Here summary how much wedding banquet will cost you this year.
Don't expect most the wedding invitations you receive this year held luxury hotels. While Singaporeans don't seem have problem paying about $1200 per table, prices per table have gone sharply the past few years that $1200 now the low end.
you're okay with picking hotel that's little off the beaten track, then exchange convenience for comfort with Star hotel. note that, generally speaking, these hotels have higher requirement for the minimum number tables you can request for.
Though there aren't too many Star hotels that provide wedding packages, you're definitely going save holding your wedding one these hotels.
Other than resorting Star hotel, how you get yourself lower table rate?
There are many benefits having wedding banquet hotel, like enjoying complimentary stay their suites, and getting special rates for rooms for your family and helpers. But with the rising prices hotel wedding banquets, these little extras just don't seem worthwhile anymore.
Consider having your wedding banquet alternative location. Country clubs like Orchid Country Club and Serangoon Gardens Country Club offer table rates least $798 and $788 respectively. Orchid Country Club's package even includes one night stay their Bridal Suite, there's reason not choose over hotel.
Paying for wedding banquet small sum money, you might well get something out it. Citibank credit cards and UOB credit cards usually have exclusive wedding promotions with certain hotels and restaurants. Alternatively, you can just choose good air miles credit card charge your wedding banquet to, and use the miles you've earned pay for your honeymoon.
This one seems like obvious suggestion, since for several hotels, banquets Saturday have their prices marked least $100 per table. That's savings least $3000 $4000 alone not having Saturday. But price really isn't the only reason you should considering having your banquet another day. Think how physically stressful traditional wedding day can be.
For many couples, the day begins ridiculously early with the bride getting made and into her gown. The men aren't entirely spared either, with the groom and his entourage going through the horrors gate crashing and bridal games (and the delays they often cause). Then there's the wedding ceremony itself, which can take two hours.
Depending how dramatic wedding banquet gets, the married couple may not even get eat! Before the dinner over, the bride needs least have had couple outfit changes, and also gone from table table taking photographs. the time the banquet ends late night, the happily married couple are often happy retire bed, and don't mean for baby-making purposes.
holding your wedding banquet another day, like Sunday, you not only have more time celebrate, but you also give yourself and your partner enough breathing room enjoy your wedding weekend.
don't care how popular you are Facebook. There's need invite your entire friend list and their cat your wedding. your in-laws are being difficult and want book like, tables, for their long lost relations and old friends from their kampung days, then now you have the perfect excuse reject them the hotel ballroom just isn't big enough.
The best part is, choosing smaller hotel ballroom might actually save you substantial amount money. Smaller Star hotels offer table rate that's almost half the price compared other Star hotels. For example, for Saturday banquet, the Grand Mercure along East Coast Road about $888 per table, and Hotel Royal along Queen Street even less $598 per table!
banquet Amara for tables would cost least $43520. banquet the Grand Mercure for tables would cost about $31080. Just cutting people off from your guest list could save you over $10000. That's definitely lot money that you can add your honeymoon fund.
Plus, you don't have invite that weird uncle with the Chihuahua from hell.
You can for the full list wedding table prices. Also, note that these prices may not include service charge GST.
What other tips and tricks you have for couples planning their wedding banquets? Share them with us.

Sometimes you only have one friend. (Hey, it's better than not having any, right?) Regardless whether you are looking play game with your significant other, your best friend, some person that you just met, there time and place where you need good two-player game. So, here's list current favorites.
Not every game has deep and strategic order lot fun. And, Jab great little real-time game when you're looking for something quick but engaging. can bit problem when you and your opponent aren't evenly matched, might best pick one person that you play Jab with and reserve for them.
For some reason, abstract strategy games tend two-player. could have easily made list two-player games simply consisting them (but, you want that, you should really check out top ten abstract strategy games). Regardless, Arimaa great game it's own right, and would remiss not include it.
Well, the United States, currently have two-party political system. And, we've had since well before the 1960's. And so, it's only natural that there should games made about this very important aspect our country. Whether you find actual politics fascinating, are somewhat apathetic about them, you still might find 1960 fun game.
So, this point you may throwing flag and pointing out that Game Thrones: The (Living) Card Game states that 2-4 player. Yes, you would right, and this game technically breaks criteria. Yet, opinion this game was designed two player game with rules for additional players tacked later (like with Magic, Star Trek: CCG, and many others). Regardless that, Game Thrones fabulous game where you are constantly struggling back and forth with your opponent number different "challenges". Since first tried this game, became hooked and just wish that played more.
Returning the abstract strategy genre, Hive makes appearance the list. This could honestly considered low position for Hive, could easily have beaten out most the games above it, depending when put this list together. When think about two-player games, Hive one the first that comes mind, and one that enjoy sharing with others.
Jaipur can considered the "significant other specialty." (Yes, just made that term up.) all the games this list, think that this the best one for playing with "non-gamer" spouse. Sure, some you may married people that love play games just much you do. However, the more common scenario seems marriages which one person loves play games drastically more than the other. For these situations, think that Jaipur may ideal game play with your special someone.
The game abstract strategy list only manages make this one. This one was hard for rank, abstract games feel different than "traditional" strategy games. fact, when first thought about this list, completely neglected all abstract strategies then remembered them and had way too many games. So, happy medium, I've added the three you see with Dvonn being the top representative the genre once again.
One the best two player games come out the last few years Summoner Wars. Though don't play much I'd like (isn't that the story this entire list?), have continued buying every expansion they come out because know... some day.... will play more! And that point will have dozens factions that can use.
Really, did this surprise anybody? I'm guessing no. said review, Twilight Struggle enough fun tempt give this site that can dedicate more time playing instead learning new games. Though not flawless, immaculate tug war that epitomizes what two player game can be!
This top ten list really had lot titles that was sad whittle away. could have easily justified including Star Wars: The (Living) Card Game Android: Netrunner, but didn't want list too many Card Games. was also shocked when didn't have enough room for Jambo. few others that just barely missed the cut were Dungeon Command, Mage Wars, and Lord the Rings: The Confrontation. Finally, Crokinole, which would have been lone dexterity entry, only missed the cut because the technicality that can played two four players.
think Axis and Allies Battle the Bulge great two player game. have had great deal fun with it.
Interesting. I've played some the other Axis and Allies offshoots, but not that one. Thanks for the tip!
You don't even list Lost Cities Balloon Cup? I'm not saying they are the best the world, though love them, and not saying Jab bad game. However. Both them are not even the Honorable Mention list.
Just kidding. need play more from your list. enjoy playing board games with wife and I'm always the hunt for new titles try.
So, didn't really care for Lost Cities all that much. It's not "bad", but wasn't for (or, more specifically, wife hated it).
haven't tried Balloon Cup, but hear good things about it, may need change that the near future.
Major agreement Jaipur and Summoner Wars.
recommendation for light 2-player game, wife and enjoy Perry Rhodan (even the movement rules were written someone with grasp orbital mechanics).
 saw Perry Rhodan sitting around FLGS Joplin for months, but the game never looked interesting enough try. Maybe missed the boat that one.
Out curiosity what didn't you like from Lost Cities.
Sure, the theme negligible, and very mathy, but LOVE messing with the draw options affect the speed the game.
wife didn't like the constant mathy-ness. Overall, just didn't engage much with the game. It's been couple years since I've played it, it's hard remember exactly what didn't click.
Great list Josh. Looks like need pick some more 2-player games. Balloon Cup currently out print, but believe that Rio Grande planning reprint with new title, Pinata, believe.

Digital displays are transforming the ways that consumers interact with brands learn how powerful this medium could for your business CSG's latest blog.
Customer behaviour changing such degree that for many businesses, building durable and profitable relationships with consumers requires new approach. Existing marketing techniques and platforms are becoming increasingly out-dated era when people are ruled their personal devices, making much what marketers and advertisers have relied over the past century ineffective. With consumers faced with more distractions than ever before, the question for any business looking stay relevant changing times what can you cut through?
Previously, the answer was simple larger with more advertising. High-gloss billboards and indoor signage were previously seen the fastest way get message market without relying mass media such TV, radio print. Unfortunately, many industry experts are tipping that most major metropolitan areas have reached the saturation point for visual advertising, with Nike Air Jordan's global director advertising Desmond Marzette arguing that consumers have become nearly immune traditional forms advertising.
"Back the day, when didn't have DVRs anything, you could get special feeling from digesting one way. Now you're seeing every 10-15 secs, whether your phone, online. It's everywhere... That's downgraded the value advertising the consumer," said.
His comments are supported survey results from NewsCred that argue that millennials now one not the largest generation most western nations are increasingly shunning traditional forms advertising and prefer brand messages that are engaging and tailored their interests.
View our range digital display offerings here.
Looking for better solution reach your audience? 2012 study members the Swedish National Road and Transport Research Institute revealed some interesting results digital display advertising. While intended examination the effects eye-catching digital displays driver awareness, the study useful for marketers shows the significant impact this advertising format can have consumers. Drivers experienced more than double the number eye fixations the act holding your gaze single location when presented with digital display compared other types signs, helping build more complete image the message and aiding recall. Additionally, their dwell times (total time spent looking the ad) were nearly three times longer than those for traditional signs, meaning that consumers were taking more and longer looks message simply because was presented digital display.
These statistics suggest that while many device users habitually press the ‘Skip' button advertisements quickly possible and can walk through street filled with static billboards without retaining single message, digital display's ability recontextualise content makes uniquely powerful.
Many companies have already recognised the effectiveness digital displays, with the industry ballooning from billion 2013 more than $23 billion 2018. addition its ability recontextualise previously ignored video content, they also offer brands the ability show some additional creativity how they reach their target market.

Born New Haven, Charles Goodyear attended school Naugatuck and, 1826, started the first retail domestic hardware store the with his father, inventor and businessman Amasa Goodyear, Philadelphia. Bankrupt four years later, Charles and his family endured poverty doggedly pursued new venture: the stabilization rubber for commercial use. 1844, after establishing the Naugatuck India-Rubber Company, Goodyear patented his vulcanization process discovery that has made possible range indispensible commercial products, from car tires sneaker treads. Despite this success, Goodyear battled patent infringements and debt until his death 1860. buried New Haven and was inducted into the National Inventors Hall Fame 1976.
